narrative.candidateAngle: Software engineer with a focus on automation and project management, bringing technical skills to civil engineering contexts.

targetStory.readerTakeaway: Quinn Taylor has a background in software engineering with transferable skills in project management, automation, and technical collaboration, suitab...

primaryStory: Experience in developing automation tools that streamline workflows and improve project efficiency.
Collaboration with cross-functional teams to enhance project outcomes and communication.
Technical proficiency in Python and Django, supporting backend development and process optimization.
secondaryStory: Experience in building and managing workflows that can translate to project management in civil engineering.
narrative.summaryGoal: Highlight software engineering experience with a focus on automation and project management, bridging to civil engineering responsibilities.

summaryDecision.reason: Summary connects software engineering skills to civil engineering roles, but lacks strong direct evidence.

skillsStrategy: Categories: align with engineering and project management skills.
Lead: Python, Django, automation tools for workflow management.
Supporting: SQL, React, project management skills, and collaboration tools.
Trim last sparingly—only duplicates, narrative avoid, or clearly different‑realm fluff; keep same‑role‑family breadth (demote trailing, do not slash for JD keyword fit).

sectionStrategy.summary: Show summary to connect software engineering to civil engineering roles.
sectionStrategy.experience: Highlight experience with automation and project management.
sectionStrategy.projects: Focus on relevant projects that demonstrate transferable skills.
sectionStrategy.skills: Order skills to reflect engineering and project management capabilities.
sectionStrategy.education: Light—credentials frozen; trim highlights only if they sharpen scan.

layoutRationale: Summary connects software engineering to civil engineering, enhancing relevance.
Experience and projects showcase transferable skills and technical capabilities.
rewriteGoals: Land BitGo: emphasize automation tools and project management skills relevant to civil engineering.
Land hero experience: lead with the role’s primary signal (services/APIs/pipelines/data) on each line; leave an evidence-backed impression of scope—full bullet-block rewrites when facts allow.
avoid: No unsupported claims about civil engineering structures or direct engineering experience.
narrative.alignmentGuidance: Stretch fit: be transparent and conservative. Frame transferable strengths, keep useful non-keyword evidence, and explicitly avoid unsupported target-role claims.
